'''zhachupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smacksman|smacksman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smacksman|smacksman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhachupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæchipith|zhæchipith]] || [[word:zhæchipij|zhæchipij]] || [[word:zhæchipish|zhæchipish]] || [[word:zhæchipi|zhæchipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhachuchuputh|zhachuchuputh]] || [[word:zhachuchupuj|zhachuchupuj]] || [[word:zhachuchupush|zhachuchupush]] || [[word:zhachuchupu|zhachuchupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhachuputh|zhachuputh]] || [[word:zhachupuj|zhachupuj]] || [[word:zhachupush|zhachupush]] || [[word:zhachupu|zhachupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhachufputh|zhachufputh]] || [[word:zhachufpuj|zhachufpuj]] || [[word:zhachufpush|zhachufpush]] || [[word:zhachufpuf|zhachufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhachuputhu|zhachuputhu]] || [[word:zhachupuju|zhachupuju]] || [[word:zhachupushu|zhachupushu]] || [[word:zhachupuku|zhachupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhachuputh|zhachuputh]] || [[word:zhachupuj|zhachupuj]] || [[word:zhachupush|zhachupush]] || [[word:zhachupu|zhachupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhachuputhul|zhachuputhul]] || [[word:zhachupujul|zhachupujul]] || [[word:zhachupushul|zhachupushul]] || [[word:zhachupukul|zhachupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhachuputhuthu|zhachuputhuthu]] || [[word:zhachupujuju|zhachupujuju]] || [[word:zhachupushushu|zhachupushushu]] || [[word:zhachupuku|zhachupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhachuputhun|zhachuputhun]] || [[word:zhachupujun|zhachupujun]] || [[word:zhachupushun|zhachupushun]] || [[word:zhachupukun|zhachupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhachuputhuoro|zhachuputhuoro]] || [[word:zhachupujuoro|zhachupujuoro]] || [[word:zhachupushuoro|zhachupushuoro]] || [[word:zhachupukuoro|zhachupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
